description: Visualization comparing MEFV domain architecture with confirmed TRIM E3 ubiquitin ligases
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(5, 1, figsize=(14, 10))
fig.suptitle('TRIM Family Domain Architecture Comparison:\nE3 Ubiquitin Ligase Activity Requires RING Domain', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Define colors for domains
domain_colors = {
    'RING': '#e74c3c',       # Red
    'B-box': '#3498db',      # Blue
    'Coiled-coil': '#95a5a6', # Gray
    'B30.2/SPRY': '#2ecc71', # Green
    'Pyrin': '#9b59b6',      # Purple
    'NHL': '#f39c12',        # Orange
}

# Protein data: (name, length, domains, has_e3_activity, evidence_level)
proteins = [
    ('TRIM21 (P19474)\nConfirmed E3 ligase', 475, 
     [('RING', 16, 55), ('B-box', 92, 123), ('Coiled-coil', 130, 233), ('B30.2/SPRY', 268, 465)],
     True, 'IDA (6 papers)'),
    ('TRIM25 (Q14258)\nConfirmed E3 ligase', 630,
     [('RING', 13, 54), ('B-box', 89, None), ('Coiled-coil', 189, 379), ('B30.2/SPRY', 439, 630)],
     True, 'IDA (5 papers)'),
    ('TRIM32 (Q13049)\nConfirmed E3 ligase', 653,
     [('RING', 20, 65), ('B-box', 103, 133), ('Coiled-coil', 148, 260), ('NHL', 367, 653)],
     True, 'IDA (4 papers)'),
    ('TRIM5α (Q9C035)\nConfirmed E3 ligase', 493,
     [('RING', 15, 59), ('B-box', 90, 132), ('Coiled-coil', 133, 235), ('B30.2/SPRY', 281, 493)],
     True, 'IBA + IEA'),
    ('MEFV/TRIM20 (O15553)\n⚠ No RING domain', 781,
     [('Pyrin', 1, 92), ('B-box', 370, 412), ('Coiled-coil', 413, 442), ('B30.2/SPRY', 580, 775)],
     False, 'IBA only'),
]

for idx, (name, length, domains, has_e3, evidence) in enumerate(proteins):
    ax = axes[idx]
    
    # Background bar
    ax.barh(0, length, height=0.5, color='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='#bdc3c7', linewidth=1)
    
    # Draw domains
    for domain_name, start, end in domains:
        if end is None:
            end = start + 40
        width = end - start
        color = domain_colors.get(domain_name, '#7f8c8d')
        ax.barh(0, width, left=start, height=0.5, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
        # Label domain
        mid = start + width/2
        fontsize = 7 if width < 60 else 8
        ax.text(mid, 0, domain_name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fontsize, 
                fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
    # E3 status indicator
    if has_e3:
        ax.text(length + 10, 0, f'✓ E3 ligase\n{evidence}', ha='left', va='center', 
                fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    else:
        ax.text(length + 10, 0, f'✗ No E3 activity\n{evidence}', ha='left', va='center', 
                fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')
    
    ax.set_xlim(-5, length + 160)
    ax.set_ylim(-0.5, 0.5)
    ax.set_ylabel(name, fontsize=8, rotation=0, ha='right', va='center', labelpad=120)
    ax.set_yticks([])
    if idx == len(proteins) - 1:
        ax.set_xlabel('Amino acid position', fontsize=10)
    else:
        ax.set_xticks([])
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# Legend
legend_patches = [mpatches.Patch(color=color, label=name) for name, color in domain_colors.items()]
fig.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc='lower center', ncol=6, fontsize=9, 
           bbox_to_anchor=(0.45, 0.01))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0.15, 0.05, 1.0, 0.95])
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("\nFigure saved: domain_architecture_comparison.png")
print("\nKey insight: All confirmed TRIM E3 ligases have RING domains.")
print("MEFV/TRIM20 replaces the RING domain with a Pyrin (PYD) domain,")
print("which is a death-fold domain involved in inflammasome signaling,")
print("NOT ubiquitin conjugation.")
